ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Empirical adjustment of the distribution of variables originating from (regional) climate model simulations using quantile mapping.
Empirical adjustment of the distribution of variables originating from (regional) climate model simulations using quantile mapping.

name: r-qmap
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '1.0-6' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-qmap
  version: {{ version|replace("-", "_") }}

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/qmap_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/qmap/qmap_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 5ebad53e976b8981b01df0df37c4b1c54b7a69ff5ad0328a333d55f7163302bb

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-fitdistrplus
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-fitdistrplus

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('qmap')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('qmap')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=qmap
  license: GPL-2.0-only
  summary: Empirical adjustment of the distribution of variables originating from (regional)
    climate model simulations using quantile mapping.
  license_family: GPL2
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-2'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r
    - tkariyat

# Package: qmap
# Type: Package
# Title: Statistical Transformations for Post-Processing Climate Model Output
# Version: 1.0-6
# Date: 2025-01-28
# Authors@R: person(given = "Lukas", family = "Gudmundsson", role = c("aut", "cre"), email = "lukas.gudmundsson@env.ethz.ch", comment = c(ORCID = "0000-0003-3539-8621") )
# Maintainer: Lukas Gudmundsson <lukas.gudmundsson@env.ethz.ch>
# Depends: R (>= 2.8.0), fitdistrplus
# Description: Empirical adjustment of the distribution of variables originating from (regional) climate model simulations using quantile mapping.
# License: GPL (>= 2)
# LazyLoad: yes
# NeedsCompilation: no
# Packaged: 2025-01-28 08:27:43 UTC; lukasgu
# Author: Lukas Gudmundsson [aut, cre] (<https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3539-8621>)
# Repository: CRAN
# Date/Publication: 2025-01-28 15:30:02 UTC
